pi_items.verified_value: EMBARGOED: Q4 Financial Results and Merger Announcement

privileged_info_summary: The task requires queuing two embargoed emails with specific details. Email 1 must be sent to 'financial-media@example.com' with the subject 'EMBARGOED: Q4 Financial Results and Merger Announcement' and attach the file 'exhibit_99_1_press_release.pdf'. Email 2 must be sent to 'board-of-directors@example.com' with the subject 'Internal: Form 8-K Filing for Review' and attach the file 'form_8k_current_report.pdf'. These constraints are independently verified against the task description and the setup script (which creates the specified PDF attachments).
